zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Jane Farrington於大約1475年出生在英國藍卡爾利藍德時，她的父親Sir William Farrington, Knight36歲，母親Lady Alice Ashton46歲。她於大約1495年與Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1510年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾利藍德享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Jane Farrington于大约1475年出生在英国藍卡爾利藍德时，她的父亲Sir William Farrington, Knight36岁，母亲Lady Alice Ashton46岁。她于大约1495年与Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1510年在英国英格兰藍卡爾利藍德享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Farrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Farrington in Lancashire, but perhaps occasionally from Farrington Gurney in Somerset. Both are named from Old English fearn ‘fern’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The surname also probably reached America via Ireland, where it is recorded as early as the 14th century.

variants.name: Fearrington
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of   Farrington  .

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Jane Farrington was born about 1475, in Leyland, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir William Farrington, Knight, was 36 and her mother, Lady Alice Ashton, was 46. She married Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight about 1495, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1510, in Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Jane Farrington est née environ 1475, à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Farrington, Knight, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Ashton, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight environ 1495, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1510, à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

Sie hat um 1495 in Yorkshire, England Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1510 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Farrington(이)가 대략 1475년 영국 랭카실르 리랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Farrington, Knight(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Ashton(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 대략 1495년 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리랜드에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Shotesham St Mary, Norfolk, England: шотешам ст мэри, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Jane Farrington родилась около 1475 г. в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Farrington, Knight было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Ashton, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight около 1495 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1510 г. в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.
